title: Zaporizhzhia: Attack attack on residential area

title: Kherson: Attack attack
description: Six-year-old girl injured in Russian attack on playground in Kherson discharged from hospital A six-year-old girl who came under a Russian attack on a playground in Kherson together with her family has been discharged from a children's hospital in the city. Read the full article on our website

description_uk: Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга щодо перехоплення одного із санкційних кораблів Росії в Ла-Манші Збройними силами Великобританії: 💬 "Вдячний Іветт Купер за лідерство та рішучі дії Великої Британії. Тіньовий флот Росії – це інструмент війни. Кожне зупинене таке судно означає менше грошей для російської воєнної машини. Перекриття цих доходів допомагає зменшити здатність Росії...

title: Explosions reported
description: Ukraine continues long-range sanctions in response to Russia's refusal to end this war — President Zelensky confirmed the strike on an oil facility in the Yaroslavl region, which is of strategic importance for Russia's reserves. It is located more than 700 km from the border of Ukraine. The "Azot" plant in the Tula Region was also hit. Russia's ability to produce explosives depends on its work.
description_en: Ukraine continues long-range sanctions in response to Russia's refusal to end this war — President Zelensky confirmed the strike on an oil facility in the Yaroslavl region, which is of strategic importance for Russia's reserves. It is located more than 700 km from the border of Ukraine. The "Azot" plant in the Tula Region was also hit. Russia's ability to produce explosives depends on its work.
description_uk: Украина продолжает дальнобойные санкции в ответ на отказ россии завершить эту войну, — Зеленский Президент подтвердил удар по нефтяному объекту в Ярославской области, который имеет стратегическое значение для резервов рф. Он находится более чем в 700 км от границы Украины. Также под удар попал завод «Азот» в Тульской области. От его работы зависят возможности рф по производству взрывчатых веществ.

title: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of...
title_en: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of...
title_uk: Трампу 80. Зараз він найстарший діючий президент в історії...
description: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of the United States, and if he serves his term to the end, he will leave the White House at the age of 83. However, age and health are one of the main topics of Donna's second term. In recent years, dementia, a stroke, serious problems with the heart and blood vessels, as well as many other diseases have been attributed to him. Let's talk about everything in order:...
description_en: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of the United States, and if he serves his term to the end, he will leave the White House at the age of 83. However, age and health are one of the main topics of Donna's second term. In recent years, dementia, a stroke, serious problems with the heart and blood vessels, as well as many other diseases have been attributed to him. Let's talk about everything in order:...
description_uk: Трампу — 80. Сейчас он является самым возрастным действующим президентом в истории США, а если досидит срок до конца, то покинет Белый дом уже в 83 года Впрочем, возраст и здоровье — одна из главных тем второго срока Донни. За последние годы ему успели приписать деменцию, инсульт, серьезные проблемы с сердцем и сосудами, а также множество других заболеваний. Давайте обо всем по порядку:...

title: Crimea: Drone incoming
description: 91 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 14 (from 18:00 on June 13), the enemy attacked 98 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russia, Chauda, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...
description_en: 91 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 14 (from 18:00 on June 13), the enemy attacked 98 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russia, Chauda, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 91 ВОРОЖИЙ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 14 червня (з 18:00 13 червня) противник атакував 98 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас, та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Орел, Брянськ, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., Чауда, Гвардійське – ТОТ АР Крим. Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем,...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Update: Russian chemical plant, oil depot set ablaze following reported Ukrainian strikes. Ukraine struck a chemical plant in Russia's Tula Oblast and an oil depot in Yaroslavl Oblast overnight on June 14, social media channels reported.

title: Kyiv: 763 injured
description: UN records highest civilian casualty toll in Ukraine since 2022. The mission verified at least 274 civilian deaths and 1,763 injuries during the month, the highest monthly casualty toll recorded in the past four years.

title: Crimea: Attack attack
description: Ukraine reports new strikes on bridges linking Crimea with mainland. Ukrainian forces struck bridges linking occupied Crimea with Russian-held territory in mainland Ukraine overnight on June 13, a Ukrainian military unit confirmed.
